content.en:
Ten Thousand Blood Ancient Mountain.

Ye Tian's copy body came here and killed the five descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape, it was very easy to kill ordinary legendary-level creatures with his current strength.

Rumble!!!!

The five descendants of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape were killed by Ye Tian in a short period of time.

The other side.

The 10,000-blooded golden ape, who was fighting with the eight-winged golden cicada, sensed that his remaining five descendants were all dead.

It went crazy.

Moreover, it did blame the eight-winged golden cicada for this fault.

So, it fought for the life with the eight-winged golden cicada.

The eight-winged golden cicada saw that the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape had been desperately attacking him, and he also hit a real fire.

The two legendary creatures with the blood of the strongest legend really fought desperately, and scars gradually appeared on their bodies.

......

"Hahaha, these two legendary creatures are finally fighting for their lives, it seems that my chance has come!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

He waited slowly, not in a hurry.

Legends.

An incomparably large fortress.

A Venerable Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon sits here, and many of them have a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm with a supreme bloodline.

At this time, they were perceiving various parts of the legendary world with a treasure.

Suddenly.

They found that the 10,000-blooded golden ape and the eight-winged golden cicada were fighting, and it was not a short fight, but a constant fight.

"Finally waiting for the opportunity, the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada are fighting, their strength is about the same, it is easy to lose both, once they are all severely damaged, we have the hope of killing them and getting two copies of the blood of the Legend of the Supreme at once. "

A Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon said excitedly.

Their Supreme Void Demons also need the blood of the strongest legends, and they are all eager to obtain the blood of the strongest legends of the Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the eight-winged golden cicada.

"The Ten Thousand Blood Golden Ape and the Eight-Winged Golden Cicada are both very powerful, even if they are hit hard, we, the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons, are not opponents, and it is easy to annihilate the entire army, so we need to send more Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons into here, combine into a large array, and besiege those two legendary-level creatures. In addition, we have to beware of those Nine Folds Dao Realms of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, if they interfere, it will be very troublesome. "

"Don't worry, those Ninefold Supreme Dao Realms of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance are not as strong as us, and the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons of our Supreme Bloodline are more than the Nine Supreme Dao Realms where they have taken the Supreme Dao Path. Moreover, we are more powerful than them, do they dare to engage in an all-out war with us? No, they don't dare!"

"Then send a message to the outside world, and let our Demon Gu Pulse send a large number of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons in. By the way, use the Great Killer to come in, and we must take down the two copies of the blood of the Legend of the Strongest. "

They were all excited.

Although there are only two copies of the blood of the Supreme Legend, they all hope to obtain it, in case it falls on their heads.

Even those top-notch Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons may be rewarded with top-level Legendary Blood.

So, they're all very positive.

......

Imaginary domain.

Mogu is in the line.

This is the strongest vein on the Void Demon side of the Supreme Dao, and it is also the core area.

Mogu is in the line.

In the fortress of the Celestial Star Demon Lord.

At this moment, the Heavenly Star Demon Lord received a message from the Legendary Realm, which was an order from a Demon Venerable sitting outside the Legendary Realm.

"Summoning a large number of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons, this is going to do something to the legendary-level creatures with the blood of the strongest legends!"

He followed the Demon Venerable's order and immediately summoned a large number of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons to the past.

It didn't take long for a large number of Supreme Dao Void Demons to be personally put away by him and go to the Legendary Realm, so that they would not be detected by the Innate Origin Domain Alliance.

Legends.

In a fortress on the side of the Void Demons.

The Celestial Star Demon Lord descended and knelt in front of a Demon Venerable.

This Demon Venerable is not the Demon Venerable of other ordinary veins such as the Heavenly Blood Vein, but the top Demon Venerable of the Demon Ancient Veterin, the Dark Blood Demon Venerable, whose strength far surpasses that of any Demon Lord.

Even if the Celestial Star Demon Lord is in the top ten among the Demon Lords, he is only an ant in front of the Dark Blood Demon Venerable.

"Heavenly Star Demon Lord, those Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons have brought them here!"

The Darkblood Demon Venerable asked.

"Lord Dark Blood Demon Venerable, I've brought it!"

The Celestial Star Demon Lord let go of the void in his body, and a Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon appeared.

Twenty-three Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons with supreme bloodlines, one hundred Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons with top-level bloodlines, and more than eight hundred Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons.

This scale is already terrifying.

"Meet the Dark Blood Demon Venerable!"

Many Ninefold Dao Void Demons knelt down one after another.

At this time, the Dark Blood Demon Venerable's gaze was fixed on the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon at the front: "Dark Lin, you will lead the team this time. "

Dark Lin, who has the strongest bloodline, and has comprehended the rules of the third sequence of the Supreme Dao, as long as he obtains the blood of the Supreme Legend, he can go to the realm of the Legendary Dao Void Demon.

In terms of strength, he is not much weaker than Ye Tian, and he is also the most demonic of the Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demon on the side of the Supreme Dao Void Demon.

In the past, the Mogu Clan would definitely personally obtain the blood of the strongest legend for Darklin, and there was no need for Darklin to work his own.

But now this era is very unfortunate, and the stored blood of the strongest legend has been used up, so he stayed in the ninefold supreme Dao Void Demon realm and could not break through.

Now, though, here's your chance.

With his strength and status, the Demon Gu First Pulse would definitely give him a place, and another share of the blood of the Supreme Legend would be given to the other Nine Supreme Dao Void Demons.

"Yes, the great Lord Darkblood!"

Darklin replied.

Immediately.

The Dark Blood Demon Venerable took out a great killing weapon.

"This is the Darkblood Shuttle, which I have infused with special powers, you entered the Legendary Realm, and took advantage of the heavy damage of the strongest legendary creature, and used this great killing weapon to severely damage it. But this thing can only be used once, and will be suppressed by the Origin of the Legendary Realm. So, find a few Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons and sacrifice them to use such a great killing weapon!"

Sacrificing a few Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons and saying it so lightly is in line with the character of the Supreme Dao Void Demon side.

Dark Lin immediately responded, "Yes, the great Lord Dark Blood Demon Venerable!"

He already has a few places in his mind, so let's sacrifice them when the time comes!

"I'll send you in myself!"

The Dark Blood Demon Venerable made a move, tearing through the barriers of the legendary realm.

Since it is not a period of weak barriers, he has also paid a little price, and the consumption is relatively large.

However, this group of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons still managed to enter the Legendary Realm.

......

After this group of Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons entered the Legendary Realm, they entered the fortress station and joined up with other Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons, and those Ninefold Supreme Dao Void Demons saw Darklin and immediately respected Darklin.

At this time, they only need to wait silently for the two legendary creatures to be severely damaged, and then they can immediately go and kill them.
